answer:
One famous song that really stands out in the United States is “Born to Run” by Bruce Springsteen. This song, released in 1975, is often considered an anthem for those who feel a little trapped in their lives and yearn for freedom. The lyrics paint this vivid picture of young lovers wanting to escape their small-town struggles, which I think really resonates with a lot of people.

What I love about “Born to Run” is its energy—it’s got this driving beat that just makes you want to get up and move, you know? The way Bruce sings, it’s like you can feel his passion and frustration, and it really pulls you in. Plus, the imagery in the song is incredible; it captures that sense of adventure and longing so perfectly.

I remember the first time I heard it; it was one of those moments where it just clicked for me. It reminds me of summer nights and road trips, when anything feels possible. So, it’s not just a song; it kind of embodies that spirit of chasing dreams and living life to the fullest. Definitely a classic!
title: Tell me about a famous song from your country. What's it called? Who sings it? Why do you like it?
extData:
{"pronuncFile":"/20250225/67dbd8976a24473495612b881ae26f49.mp3","answerTemplate":"开场陈述：  
“When it comes to music, [mention the concept of cultural significance or personal impact], and one song that stands out in my country is [name of the song].”

正文：  
关于歌曲的介绍：  
“The song is called [song name], and it is performed by [artist's name].”  
提及它的流行原因：  
“This song has become popular because [reason, such as its catchy tune, meaningful lyrics, or its connection to a specific event].”

个人联系：  
“Explain why you like it: I personally enjoy this song because [reason, such as it evokes memories, its message resonates with me, or the melody is uplifting].”  
举例说明：  
“For instance, whenever I listen to it, I feel [emotion or memory associated with the song].”

文化影响：  
“Discuss its impact on society: [Song name] has also played a significant role in [explain its cultural relevance, such as uniting people, influencing a movement, or representing a generation].”

结论：  
总结歌曲的意义：  
“In conclusion, [song name] is not just a popular track; it embodies [summarize the essence or importance of the song].”  
最后的想法：  
“It's a reminder of [something meaningful related to the song or music in general] and continues to inspire many.”","titleTranslate":"告诉我一首你国家的著名歌曲。它叫什么名字？谁唱的？你为什么喜欢它？"}
